notes: C3131 Lead: ROOT CAUSE FOUND for 6th-recurrence pause map bug. devloop_orchestrator.py line 2096-2101 deletes agents with 'until_lead_directive' from pause map after Lead completes, but line 730-735 only re-adds QA_AGENTS (trace) — Bolt is DEV_AGENT and never gets re-added. schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit or until_lead_directive)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
